pageContext.name: Hulk #1
pageContext.description: I am not controlled by my rage anymore. I am fueled by it.   Sideshow Art Prints presents the Hulk #1 Fine Art Print, a smashing new Marvel Comics art print by artist Marco Mastrazzo.  Bruce Banner and the Hulk are two sides of the same very angry coin. The Hulk has been seen as a hero, a monster, and a force of destruction throughout his tortured existence, but one thing always remains the same — his sheer strength. Artist Marco Mastrazzo captures the explosive might of the green, gamma-irradiated beast as he sends a shockwave through the earth with a slam of his fists. Power and fury radiate through the composition with artful strokes and action blurs that shake the very foundation of the image itself.  Originally created as a retailer exclusive variant cover for Hulk #1 (2021), written by Donny Cates for Marvel Comics, this comic book collectible is now available in a fine art presentation for fans. Each Hulk #1 Fine Art Print features an authorized, automated artist signature and an embossed Seal of Authenticity as a part of the limited edition of 300 pieces. The Marvel wall art is available unframed or in a custom framed format, perfect for displaying alongside your favorite Hulk collectibles.  Unleash the full fury of Bruce Banner and bring home the Hulk #1 Fine Art Print by Marco Mastrazzo today!
